turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, refunds team here. What can I sort out for you today?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: One thing first, we record these calls for training.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I was charged for something I cancelled before it shipped.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sorry to hear that. Let me check the status of the return.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Right, the system held it for review. I can release it now.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: So when will it actually land in my account?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: So when will it actually land in my account?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I've waited long enough. Let me talk to your manager.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I get it, this has dragged on. Let me loop in my supervisor.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: All done here. Is there anything else I can help you with?
